result.summary: Found 3 issues: a critical accessibility problem with unreadable fine print, a major layout disruption with the 'SCROLL DOWN' element, and a major responsiveness concern with the bonus offers section.

issues.description: Fine print terms and conditions text at the bottom is extremely small and has insufficient contrast, making it nearly impossible to read for users
issues.suggestion: Increase font size to at least 12px, improve contrast between text and background, and consider using a modal or expandable section for detailed terms

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' element with checkmarks is visually disruptive and appears to break up the content flow unnecessarily in the middle of the page
issues.suggestion: Either remove this element entirely since users know to scroll, or relocate it to a more appropriate location like the top of the page as a subtle indicator

issues.description: The two bonus offer boxes (ALL PLAYERS / NEW PLAYERS) are displayed side-by-side in a rigid two-column layout that likely breaks on mobile devices and tablets
issues.suggestion: Implement responsive design so boxes stack vertically on screens smaller than 768px, ensuring proper readability and spacing on all device sizes
